author: doll-agent
content: Implemented fromregex(content, regex) and fromregex_from_file(path, regex) in ferray-io::text. Each capture group becomes a column; lines with unparseable captures are skipped silently (matching numpy.fromregex's behavior on string-dtype output but applied uniformly to T: FromStr). NumPy's structured-dtype output is intentionally not modeled — every capture must parse to the same T; for mixed dtypes, call once per column or use ferray-core::record. Added regex to ferray-io workspace deps. Re-exported via ferray-io lib.rs. 6 unit tests cover basic, multi-group, no-groups error, invalid-regex error, unparseable-row skipping, and file-roundtrip paths.
